verse_text: 'Look, a people came out of Egypt, and they cover the face of the earth and are settling next to me. Therefore, come at once, and curse them for me; perhaps I shall be able to strike them and drive them from the land.' '

links.context: False teachers are condemned for both their words and their actions. Those who are natural cannot understand spiritual things ([[1CO.2:14]]) and will be destroyed, as false prophets have been in the past. For the story of Balaam (v. 15), see [[NUM.22:1]]-25:9; 31:8, 16; [[DEU.23:4]], [[DEU.23:5]]; [[JOS.13:22]]; Jude 11.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
